title: Remote Work & Productivity Survey
description: Help us understand how distributed teams work, what challenges they face, and what makes remote collaboration effective. Estimated time: 3 minutes.

questions.question: How satisfied are you with your overall remote work experience? (1 = very dissatisfied, 10 = very satisfied)
How long have you been working remotely?
What best describes your primary job function?
Which collaboration tools do you use daily? (select all that apply)
What is your single biggest productivity blocker while working remotely?
Do you have a dedicated, distraction-free home office space?
How effective is your manager at leading a remote team? (1 = poor, 5 = excellent)
On average, how many hours per day do you work remotely?
Describe your ideal future-of-work arrangement. What would your perfect mix of remote, hybrid, and in-office look like?
When did you first transition to remote or hybrid work?
